purpose: Curated historical operations research for future level design. This library is descriptive, not exhaustive, and is meant to translate broad historical dynamics into abstracted game scenarios.

libraries.label: State formation and interstate wars
libraries.focus: Large-scale state survival, maneuver warfare, supply corridors, and conventional fronts.

libraries.label: Special operations and strategic strikes
libraries.focus: Short-duration missions built around surprise, intelligence, and deep reach.

libraries.label: Northern front and Lebanon campaigns
libraries.focus: Northern border pressure, rocket campaigns, and deterrence cycles from Lebanon.

libraries.label: West Bank and Gaza campaigns
libraries.focus: Urban pressure, rocket defense, tunnels, raids, and short-interval escalation.
